creator: bright@hotjobs.com
text:
it seems slightly fixed now:

~ % df -t devfs
Filesystem  1K-blocks     Used    Avail Capacity  Mounted on
/dev/wd0s1a     39647    20272    16204    56%    /
devfs              16       16        0   100%    /dev            

the: /dev/wd0s1a     39647    20272    16204    56%    /

concerns me though.

--
